codeReview.summary: The fix commit fully addresses both prior blocking failures: middleware now propagates Supabase cookies on every fresh redirect/JSON response branch, and public-path matching is tightened to exact `/auth/callback`; additionally, `getSessionUser()` shape was re-validated against current route consumers and remains compatible without code changes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Cookie guidance is ambiguous: mission AGENTS.md says to never use individual cookie set/get/remove, but this fix correctly uses per-cookie `target.cookies.set(cookie)` to copy cookies from `supabaseResponse` because `ResponseCookies` on `NextResponse` does not expose `setAll`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md (@supabase/ssr section) states 'NEVER use individual get/set/remove'; src/middleware.ts in commit 0119dce uses `for (const cookie of source.cookies.getAll()) { target.cookies.set(cookie); }` to preserve Supabase cookies across fresh responses.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the fix feature transcript skeleton and diffs for fix commit 0119dce plus both original failed commits/reviews. The middleware cookie-propagation contract is now satisfied across all previously failing branches, `/auth/*` broad bypass was removed, and current `getSessionUser()` return shape matches inspected consumers (`/api/auth/me`, `/api/student/me`, `/api/business/profile`).
